title: siphocampylus crenatus
intro: Siphocampylus crenatus is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, commonly known as the Crenated Siphocampylus or the Toothed Siphocampylus. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Siphocampylus crenatus can be prepared as a tea or decoction, and it has also been used in folk medicine to treat digestive issues and as an antiseptic agent.
